label: experimental/frontier
rq: RQ49: Speaker-count stratified threshold for reduced modality
method: reanalysis only (no Whisper / no ASR run). Active speakers = count of non-empty separated_text_per_speaker values (RQ38 definition). Stratify the 77 windows into <=2 active speakers (stratum 1, where Mode S occurs) and >2 active speakers (stratum 2). Per stratum: B=2000 bootstrap resamples (seed=42, n=stratum_size with replacement); calibrate lang-id entropy threshold maximising sensitivity at >=90% specificity (RQ44 rule) on in-bag; evaluate corrected-router cpWER on out-of-bag. Stratified router: aligned resamples, calibrate a threshold per stratum, evaluate COMBINED OOB cpWER (each OOB window routed by its own stratum's threshold).
routing_rule: lang_id_entropy >= threshold -> route MIXED (always_mixed_cpwer); else route SEPARATED (always_separated_cpwer). HIGH lang-id entropy = diverse multilingual gibberish = hallucination (RQ13/RQ16/RQ25/RQ44).
calibration_rule: sweep threshold 0.0-2.0 bits in 0.01 steps; select threshold maximising sensitivity at >= 90% specificity. Tie-breaker: higher specificity, then lower threshold.

in_sample_reproduction.note: Pooled reproduces RQ44/RQ25's 0.38 in-sample threshold on all 77 windows.

pooled_bootstrap_matched.note: Pooled RQ44 recipe at matched B=2000, seed=42 for within-script comparison.

H49c.statement: stratified router median OOB cpWER < RQ44's 1.056
H49c.substantive_note: H49c is supported only by a sub-0.001 rounding margin: the combined median (1.055556) is numerically IDENTICAL to RQ44's exact pooled median (1.055556) and slightly higher than the matched-B pooled median (1.053922). Stratification provides no substantive OOB cpWER improvement.
